reviews.text: Janna was so sweet with our little man and extremely smooth/efficient during the shoot. Not once did we feel uncomfortable or that our son was in unsafe hands. The photos turned out phenomenally and we can’t wait to use her again for our year 1 photo shoot! Highly recommended.

Janna is seriously one of the most amazing and hardworking photographers in the county! We have been using her for my daughters photos since her birth. Janna was with me the whole 12 hours I was delivering and captured the most precious memories. She even came back the next day to ensure she got the best photos! My daughters two and hasn’t had her photos done by anyone else. She’s super versatile and conforms to my ever changing styles!  Janna is kind and creative and you definitely won’t be disappointed by her work!

We've had our daughter photographed twice and were so please with our photos. Our daughter was quite sassy the last session, but Janna worked her magic and got the BEST photos! Janna is so easy to work with and is great with kids of any age. Her studio is wonderful and she has the cutest props. We love it there and plan to use her in the future!

We've  used Janna for 2 newborn shoots, and 2 portrait shoots of 2 toddlers...my only complaint is trying  to pick my favorite images is impossible!  Janna is pure magic with kids and her photos are incredible - the lighting is perfect, she manages  to take amazing photos of exhausted postpartum moms and make them look fresh and wonderful. She captures joy and the family effortlessly.  Her photos are all over my house. We used another well known photographer  in town once - never again.  Her photos were uninspired and lackluster compared to Jannas.  Janna is worth every penny!

We received a newborn session with Janna for or daughter as a gift from my family - and I am so incredibly glad to have captured those first few days with her like that! Janna was so gentle and patient with our kiddo - it is so apparent how much she loves her work and getting to photograph such a special time. We had so much fun, and the photographs are beautiful. Would highly recommend!
